Report.Comment: Fused Intel shows the 111th is stationary in an ATK POSN just North of PL THOR. Current slant is 31/116
82d ABN DIV reports HUMINT indicates a SOM cell of approximately 30 personnel are operating IVO the pro DONOVIAN BLISS district of POTI. 1/82 has been tasked to conduct cordon and search.

Symbol.Name: 2ABCT\1 CD

Report.Comment: Donovian Town
Donovian Town
Donovian Town
Donovian Town
Atropian Town

IF ENEMY SIT:  EN IDF Assets at OBJ MOE with no ARMOR SPT

AND

FRIENDLY SIT: 4-9 CAV at PL WESLEY at 85% Strength and 3-16 FA REDCON A.

THEN: 4-9 CAV conducts raid to destroy IDF assets, then returns to screen line along PL WESLEY

The mayor of POTI, Hwango de Bango, was shot to death outside of the POTI Municipal Building, after signing a law imposing additional movement restrictions on Donovians living in POTI. He is succeeeded by Juan Chavez, his deputy.
2 satchel remote IEDs were detonated at the POTI medical clinic; 12 civilians killed, 10 wounded. 2 US SF personnel wounded and evacuated by SF personnel
4 satchel remote IEDs were detonated at the POTI N. medical clinic; 8 civilians killed, 6 civilians wounded. 82BSB XO and driver wounded; 1 x HMWWV destroyed
One satchel charge exploded at the courthouse in GARDAKERT. 4 CIV KIA, 4 x WIA. Building destroyed.
HHC 3/82 reports finding a cache of 24 107mm RKTs, 44 land mines, 100 82mm MTR rounds, 4 82mm MTR Tubes, and 400kg of HME.

150 personnel demonstrating on MSR BLUE, IVO TAA IRON. Most placards portray Anti-American/Anti-GORGAN sentiment. Traffic currently stopped on MSR BLUE. Some demonstrators have changed themselves across the road, 82MPs on station.
250 pro Donovians demonstrators at 2ABCT Main CP carrying banners declaring US occupation of GORGUS a war crime. Roads in and out of CP blocked. Rocks being thrown at  2ABCT soldiers
250 pro Donovian student demonstrators at POTI University threatening to swarm US forces and prevent them from murdering the honarable Donovian people. Throwing rocks and bottles at US soldiers.
2 x 155mm IED exploded on HHC 4-9 CAV Convoy. 4 x US WIA, 2 x US KIA, 2 x HMWWV's destroyed.  Detonator was command wire. 1 x suspected SOM wounded and arrested.
5-73 reports 100kg HME based, buried water tank IED detonated on A TRP while conducting screen along PL CONTOUR. 1 MRAP destroyed. 1 US KIA, 2 x US WIA.
24 rounds 82mm MTR rounds landed IVO 1/1 MECH (GORG) trail party; 12 x WIA, 4 x KIA, 1 x HMMWV Destroyed
12 rounds MTR landed IVO 82ABN TAC; 1 x WIA, 1 HMMWV Destroyed
24 rounds 82mm MTR rounds landed Radio Tower; tower destroyed; all commercial radio station operations halted. POO located at 13SCR 75119 43181
82d ABN DIV reports HUMINT indicates a SOM cell of approximately 30 personnel are operating IVO the pro DONOVIAN BLISS district of POTI. 1/82 has been tasked to conduct cordon and search.
